data.title: Bitcoin OG has closed most of its short positions, making a profit of over $160 million in 30 hours
data.description: According to LookonChain, a Bitcoin OG whale that previously shorted BTC and ETH has closed most of its short positions, making a profit of over $160 million in 30 hours. It currently holds a short position of 821.6 BTC (worth $92 million).

data.title: Bitcoin Investor Profits Amid Market Downturn
data.description: According to Foresight News, Onchain Lens monitoring has revealed that a prominent Bitcoin investor has closed their Ethereum short position, which was leveraged 12 times, amid a significant market decline. This move resulted in a profit of $72.33 million. Additionally, the investor closed most of their Bitcoin short position, leveraged 10 times, earning $81 million. Currently, they still hold an unrealized profit of $7 million.

data.title: Analysis: The actual market liquidation amount may exceed $40 billion, with HyperLiquid liquidation amount alone reaching nearly $7 billion
data.description: On-chain data analyst MLM Yu X posted a post stating that the liquidation figures circulating in the market are incorrect and that the actual number is likely much higher, ranging from $30 billion to $40 billion or even higher. On Hyperliquid alone, nearly $7 billion was liquidated.

data.title: Primitive Ventures founder: The market crash may be caused by a large-scale liquidation of an institution on Binance, and the USDe price difference reflects the differences between platforms
data.description: Primitive Ventures founder Dovey posted on the X platform, speculating that the recent market crash was caused by a large-scale margin call on Binance by a major institution (possibly a cross-margin trading firm). While further analysis is needed, preliminary data indicates that the price of USDe on Binance plummeted to as low as $0.6, while prices on other exchanges remained relatively strong. Furthermore, there has been a significant discrepancy in trading volume between tokens listed on Binance and those not listed on Binance.

data.title: Reeves presses CEOs to promote UK optimism before tax-hike budget
data.description:
Chancellor Rachel Reeves has called on UK business leaders to promote confidence in Britain’s economy.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/reeves-presses-ceos-to-promote-uk-optimism/

data.title: Liquid Capital Founder Predicts Market Downturn Based on Research Data
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Liquid Capital founder Yi Lihua recently shared insights on the institution's strategic moves, emphasizing transparency in their operations. Yi noted that the firm has been openly liquidating assets, a decision informed by research data indicating a market decline. He clarified that this approach is based solely on data analysis, without any insider information. Despite efforts, Trend Research, a subsidiary, did not manage to sell at the market peak. Yi highlighted the importance of longevity in the cryptocurrency sector over maximizing profits.

Yi Lihua previously mentioned on October 9 that a significant buying opportunity is imminent. Between October 3 and 5, Trend Research transferred 145,000 ETH, valued at $654 million, to centralized exchanges (CEX).

data.title: WLFI officially purchased $10 million of WLFI today, with an average price of $0.18. The current floating loss is over 30%.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Yu Jin, WLFI officials spent 10 million USD1 to purchase 55.687 million WLFI tokens at an average price of $0.18 between 3 and 4 AM this morning, when the token's price began to decline. Just an hour later, at around 5 AM, the altcoin experienced a major crash, with WLFI plummeting to a low of $0.07. It has since rebounded to $0.12, a drop of over 30% from the purchase price.

data.title: Some of "Big Brother Maji"'s ETH long positions were liquidated, with a 24-hour loss of over $15 million, but he still holds 25 times the ETH long position
data.description: Hypurrscan data shows that the ETH long positions under the name of "Big Brother Maji" Huang Licheng have been liquidated on a large scale, with a 24-hour loss of nearly 15.3 million US dollars; he currently still holds a 25-fold long position of 300 ETH, worth 1.16 million US dollars.

data.title: Aave founder: The protocol liquidated a record $180 million in collateral assets in one hour
data.description: Aave founder Stani posted on X that Aave underwent its largest stress test today. The protocol ran perfectly and automatically liquidated a record $180 million in collateral assets within an hour.

data.title: Binance: All platform services have been restored and the platform's high load has ended
data.description: Binance officially announced on its X platform that all services have been restored and that platform operations are gradually returning to normal. Earlier reports indicated that due to frequent market activity, the Binance platform system was under high load, and some users may have experienced intermittent delays or display issues.

data.title: Federal Reserve's Policy Uncertainty Influences Cryptocurrency Market
data.description:
According to PANews, recent developments in the macroeconomic landscape have highlighted the Federal Reserve's 'policy split' and 'information vacuum,' which are causing short-term market fluctuations and potentially setting the stage for long-term structural benefits. The market consensus anticipates a 25 basis point rate cut by the Federal Reserve in its October meeting, following signals from Chairman Jerome Powell indicating a 'flexible dovish' stance. This expectation has bolstered confidence in liquidity easing, driving capital into the cryptocurrency market and pushing Bitcoin's price to a short-term high of $126,000, reflecting positive market sentiment.

The ongoing easing policies are expected to dilute the purchasing power of fiat currencies, reinforcing Bitcoin's narrative as an inflation-resistant, non-sovereign store of value. Bitcoin's correlation with gold, rather than U.S. stocks, underscores its hedging attributes. The recent pullback of Bitcoin to $121,000 and the volatility in altcoins are seen as the market's natural response to digesting high-risk levels and awaiting macroeconomic data confirmation, rather than a breakdown of previous macroeconomic logic.

The Federal Reserve's current 'policy split' and 'information vacuum' have intensified short-term market consolidation and volatility. Two key factors are at play: Powell's flexible stance and the Fed's inclination towards 'preventive rate cuts' have created a psychological expectation of 'long-term liquidity easing,' providing emotional support for the cryptocurrency market. As long as the Fed does not rule out the possibility of rate cuts, fears of a 'bear market' remain subdued.

The delay in releasing key economic data due to a government shutdown has turned the October Fed meeting into a decision-making process 'flying in the dark.' This uncertainty has led to 'unexpected optimism premiums' during market highs, which have transformed into 'uncertainty risk premiums' as emotions stabilize. The current market decline is a phase of releasing these risk premiums.

The ongoing market consolidation is essentially a natural transition in investor psychology from 'blind optimism' to 'cautious observation,' rather than a trend reversal. It is likely a buildup of momentum for the next upward surge. The market's core focus has shifted to 'delayed key economic data.' If the data, once released, indicates economic weakness in employment and inflation, it will provide 'factual support' for Fed rate cuts. This could lead to a concentrated release of suppressed liquidity, likely maintaining Bitcoin's strong momentum and pushing it to new highs. In summary, the ultimate formation of the cryptocurrency market trend relies on the combined validation of 'macroeconomic data and Federal Reserve actions.'

data.title: Aave Undergoes Largest Stress Test with $180 Million in Automated Liquidations
data.description: According to Foresight News, Aave founder Stani Kulechov announced at 6:30 today that the platform experienced its largest stress test to date. The protocol successfully automated the liquidation of a record $180 million in collateral assets within one hour, without any manual intervention.

data.title: Here’s How High The XRP Price Would Be With The Market Cap Of Bitcoin
data.description:
Among all the cryptocurrencies in the industry, few have seen as many comments and predictions as XRP. Once trapped under legal uncertainty, XRP has begun to reclaim attention thanks to favorable legal developments and the anticipated launch of Spot XRP ETFs. However, XRP’s current valuation is significantly below that of the largest cryptocurrency, Bitcoin. But what if XRP were to rise to the same market capitalization as Bitcoin? Data from MarketCapOf offers a glimpse into how much each XRP token would be worth if it reached Bitcoin’s current market cap
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/xrp-news/how-high-xrp-would-be/
